summary: Full pre-launch audit of Remake Pixel (public + auth + dashboard + tools + mobile + admin). Backend 35/36 pytest passing. Frontend public pages and most dashboard pages load OK, BUT 3 CRITICAL issues found: (1) /api/generations/proxy-media not implemented in Python backend → all gallery thumbnails are broken (visible blank boxes), (2) 5 of 6 Tools sub-pages crash with white screen (Cannot read properties of null reading 'current') — bg-remove, upscale, restore, colorize, inpaint; only clothes works, (3) /api/admin/finance returns 500 because the `from services.finance_model import` is OUTSIDE the try/except ImportError block. Mobile responsiveness at 390px is good (no overflow on landing/generate/posters/pro/artistic). Language switcher present. Login works. Smoke image-generation NOT triggered (Tools workflows blocked by tool-page crash; backend validation paths for /generate/easy and /generate/pro work).

critical.issue: Returns 500 — `from services.finance_model import aggregate_finance` is placed BEFORE the try block at server.py line 1839; the `except ImportError` at line 1844 never catches the ModuleNotFoundError. Move the import inside the try.

Endpoint is referenced by frontend (lib/creationUrls.js line 63) for proxying Replicate image URLs, but Python backend server.py does NOT implement it. Returns 405 (matches DELETE /api/generations/{creation_id}). Consequence: ALL gallery/dashboard images that are proxied (gallery thumbnails, explore feed) render as blank boxes. The Node Vercel API (/app/api/lib/creationsRoutes.cjs) has it; FastAPI parity is missing.

ui_bugs.issue: White screen / runtime crash on mount with pageerror: 'Cannot read properties of null (reading \'current\')'. body.innerText is empty. The only Tools subpage that still works is /app/tools/clothes (ClothesChanger does not use useStudioMediaPreview). The common dependency across all 5 broken pages is `useStudioMediaPreview` (src/hooks/useStudioMediaPreview.js) + StudioGenerateBar/StudioGenerateCostMeta stack. Likely root cause: a hook in that chain receives a null ref/value (suspect: storeRef.current race in useStudioMediaPreview.js, or PricingContext returning undefined for `costs` before resolved — needs main agent to add a null guard).
All 29 image tiles render as blank placeholders. Root cause is the missing /api/generations/proxy-media backend route — img src returns 405. Visible to user as empty cards.
Same 405 on /api/generations/proxy-media — public explore gallery images broken.

integration_issues.issue: Tool pages crash on entry, blocking BG remove / Upscale / Restore / Colorize / Inpaint flows entirely.
Images do not load due to missing proxy endpoint; user sees empty gallery despite having 29+ generations.

issues: Page title hard-coded in Portuguese ('Nova palavra-passe · Remake Pixel') even when language is EN — minor i18n inconsistency, no impact on flow.

action_items: FIX server.py admin_finance_endpoint: move `from services.finance_model import aggregate_finance` INSIDE the try block (or wrap in `try: import ... except ImportError: fallback`).

IMPLEMENT /api/generations/proxy-media GET endpoint in backend/server.py — port logic from /app/api/lib/creationsRoutes.cjs lines 156+ (validate URL host whitelist e.g. replicate.delivery, stream image bytes back). Without this, gallery + explore images are completely broken.

FIX white-screen crash in 5 Tools pages. Add null guards in src/hooks/useStudioMediaPreview.js (storeRef may be null after cleanup) and/or check that usePricing() returns a non-null `costs` object before destructuring in BgRemove/Upscale/Restore/Colorize/Inpaint. Compare with ClothesChanger which works.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1919 lines — should be split into routers (auth/generate/wizard/admin/stripe/tools).
admin_finance_endpoint has `from services.finance_model import` outside its try block — defeats the `except ImportError` fallback. Classic bug.

Backend FastAPI route parity vs the Node Vercel API is incomplete. /api/generations/proxy-media exists in /app/api/lib/creationsRoutes.cjs but not in server.py. There may be other Node-only routes missing — main agent should diff /app/api/* against server.py before launch.

useStudioMediaPreview cleanup sets storeRef.current = null AFTER passing it to revokePreviewUrl as if it were a URL string (it is actually the wrapper object {current, key}) — revokePreviewUrl(store.current) would have been correct. Logic appears confused.

All 5 broken tool pages share PricingContext + useStudioMediaPreview imports — if costs is undefined on first render the destructure `const { costs } = usePricing()` is fine, but `costs.bgRemove` would throw 'Cannot read properties of undefined'. Suspect this is the actual crash path; add a default `{}` fallback.
Test user (test@remakepix.com) login returned non-200 — file /app/memory/test_credentials.md still advertises this account but it doesn't appear seeded. Either seed it or remove from docs.

success_rate.frontend: 70% — public pages OK, dashboard OK except 5/6 tool subpages crash, gallery/explore images broken

test_credentials: Admin admin@remakepix.com / Admin@2026Remake works (99924 credits visible). test@remakepix.com / Test@2026Remake login FAILED — account not seeded; update /app/memory/test_credentials.md or seed it.
seed_data_creation: None. Admin already has 99k credits and ~29 historical generations in gallery.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_full_audit.py for backend regression. The proxy-media issue impacts every screen showing generation thumbnails. After main agent fixes the 3 critical bugs, re-run the same Playwright flow: login → visit all dashboard pages → confirm no console pageerror and that gallery/explore images load (HTTP 200, not 405). Smoke generation on /app/generate was intentionally not triggered to avoid burning paid API credits — main agent should validate that manually once tool pages render.
rca of the issue: 1) /api/admin/finance 500 — `from services.finance_model import ...` on line 1839 is positioned BEFORE the `try:` on line 1840, so the ModuleNotFoundError escapes the `except ImportError` on line 1844. Fix: indent the import into the try, or wrap as `try: from services.finance_model import aggregate_finance\nexcept ImportError: aggregate_finance = None` and branch accordingly. 2) /api/generations/proxy-media 405 — the Python FastAPI backend was migrated from the Node Vercel API but this route was never ported. Frontend (lib/creationUrls.js) builds URLs assuming it exists; FastAPI router matches the request against DELETE /api/generations/{creation_id} for the path component, returning 405. Fix: add a GET endpoint accepting `u` query param, validate against allowed hosts (replicate.delivery, etc.), stream via httpx. 3) Tool pages white screen — runtime TypeError 'reading current of null'. All 5 broken pages share `useStudioMediaPreview(photo)` + `usePricing()` + StudioGenerateBar stack. Most likely a null deref inside one of those hooks/components during first render. Needs source-level fix by main agent.
